meta.title: Fortinet - Beyond Visibility in OT
meta.description:
Rick Peters of Fortinet begins by going over what he sees as the key trends in and threats to Operations Technology (OT). He then turns to solutions and talks about the broad, integrated and automated security framework that asset owners need. And collaboration between the asset owners and multiple vendors is required to make this work.

He finishes by giving an overview of the Fortinet Security Fabric and how it can be used in OT.
